<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Protocol\Text\Handler; use Predis\Connection\CompositeConnectionInterface; /** * Defines a pluggable handler used to parse a particular type of response. */ interface ResponseHandlerInterface { /** * Deserializes a response returned by Redis and reads more data from the * connection if needed. * * @param CompositeConnectionInterface $connection Redis connection. * @param string $payload String payload. * * @return mixed */ public function handle(CompositeConnectionInterface $connection, $payload); }
